subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! Today, he that is possessed of true vision is the one who hath turned towards the Most Great Horizon. Today, he that advanceth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر امروز صاحب بصر نفسی است که بمنظر اکبر اقبال نمود امروز مقبل
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @presence of; reunion with God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution
